reasoning: Lactate clearance is key to improve Koren’s 5 to 20-minute power drop. Emigration Canyon is an excellent venue to practice the aerobic base and fatigue resistance needed for the Alpine Loop. Given Koren’s last ride was relatively low intensity, this session is designed to challenge and build these areas.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4x10 min over-unders: 6 min at 209-223W, 4 min at 242-256W. Recover 5 min easy between intervals.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
